data.title: Hong Kong Banking Association Welcomes New Fiscal Budget Measures
data.description: According to Odaily, the Hong Kong Banking Association has expressed support for the new measures proposed in the latest fiscal budget. The association believes these measures will promote market diversification and identify new growth opportunities, providing fresh momentum for the local economy. As the Hong Kong government prepares to release its second policy statement on virtual asset development and introduce a regulatory framework for fiat-backed stablecoin issuers, the association sees this as a step towards enhancing the virtual asset ecosystem. The industry is expected to explore the potential value of digital asset technology while balancing risk management and business development, contributing to Hong Kong's ambition to become a global digital asset hub.

data.title: Stronghold Shareholders Approve Merger With Bitfarms
data.description: According to PANews, Stronghold, a Bitcoin mining company, has announced that its shareholders have overwhelmingly voted in favor of the upcoming merger with Bitfarms Ltd. The merger agreement and plan were initially signed on August 21, 2024, and have since been revised. Following the approval of the merger proposal, the company anticipates that the merger will be completed by March 2025, pending the fulfillment or waiver of remaining conditions. The final report on the results of the special shareholders' meeting will be submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in the form of an 8-K filing.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Resolves Issues in Pectra System Contract Audit
data.description: According to Odaily, the Ethereum Foundation has announced the results of the audit for the Pectra system contracts. The audit revealed that all relevant or significant issues identified during the review have been addressed. The Pectra system contracts incorporate several Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIPs), including EIP-2935, EIP-7002, and EIP-7251. The primary focus of the audit was to assess potential attack vectors within the contracts and ensure that the contract logic accurately implements the intended functions as specified by the EIP standards.

data.title: Hong Kong Association of Banks: Hong Kong banking industry will explore the value of digital assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Hong Kong Association of Banks welcomed the measures proposed in the new "Budget", saying that the measures will help promote market diversification and open up new growth points, injecting new momentum into Hong Kong's economy. The Hong Kong Association of Banks said that as the Hong Kong government is about to issue its second policy statement on the development of virtual assets and submit a draft bill on the introduction of a regulatory system for issuers of fiat stablecoins to improve the development framework of the virtual asset ecosystem, the industry will explore the potential value of digital asset technology for industry development on the premise of balancing risk management and business development, and contribute to Hong Kong's development into a global digital asset hub. (Hong Kong Economic Journal)

data.title: Traders hedge against Bitcoin's drop to $70,000, market needs new catalyst to reverse bearish sentiment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin is plummeting further, down 25% from its all-time high less than six weeks ago as of Friday, and this decline is prompting traders to hedge against a drop to $70,000. Deribit data shows that the number of open contracts for Bitcoin put options with a strike price of $70,000 ranks second among all contracts expiring on February 28. A total of $4.9 billion in open interest will expire on Friday, and the lack of clear bullish signals has prompted investors to wait and see in a risk-averse environment and withdraw funds from cryptocurrencies. "The cryptocurrency market is still looking for new catalysts to reverse bearish sentiment," said Ravi Doshi, co-head of market at cryptocurrency market maker FalconX. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Planet Evening News
UniSat: PizzaSwap 1.1 is now available
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News UniSat announced on the X platform that PizzaSwap 1.1 version has been launched. The native stablecoin SUSD based on the Runes protocol will be launched on the platform soon. In addition, the new version will reduce the waiting time for deposits and withdrawals, integrate bridges and allow users to deposit BRC-20 assets.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation announces audit results of Pectra system contracts: all issues have been resolved
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Ethereum Foundation announced the audit results of the Pectra system contract and disclosed that all relevant or important issues found in the review have been resolved. The Pectra system contract contains multiple EIPs (EIP-2935, EIP-7002 and EIP-7251). The audit is mainly to:
Evaluate potential attack vectors in the contract.
Ensure that the contract logic accurately implements the expected functions in accordance with the EIP specification.

data.title: Ethereum erases 50% value post-Trump markets
data.description:
According to the Global Capital Markets analysis team, the Kobeissi Letter, Ethereum (ETH) has shed almost 50% of its value since the end-2024 bull market run that began when President Donald Trump won the US elections. The global crypto market is also down 30% from its 3-month high of $3.895 trillion, according to Coingecko. This […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-erases-50-value-post-trump-markets/

data.title: Crypto Bloodbath: Bitcoin and Ether Plunge on Tariff Uncertainty
data.description:
TL;DR Market Plunge: Bitcoin and Ether drop below key levels, $80K and $2,100 as tariff uncertainty shakes investor confidence. Tariff Tension: U.S. tariff hikes on imports stoke fears of trade wars, potentially driving inflation and economic slowdowns. Liquidation Wave: Hedge fund sell-offs trigger over $1.34B in crypto liquidations, dragging down overall market cap by 7.25%. ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-bloodbath-bitcoin-and-ether-plunge-on-tariff-uncertainty/
